data.title: Pricefx starts 2026 strong with record-breaking 2025 results, including high growth and customer retention due to rapid AI adoption.
data.description: Chicago-based Pricefx, a top provider of cloud-native pricing software leveraging AI technology, revealed impressive performance results for 2025. The year showcased remarkable growth, significant customer retention rates, and swift integration of its leading AI solutions, setting the stage for another remarkable year ahead. The surge in growth was primarily driven by the mounting urgency surrounding pricing strategies, elevating it to the executive spotlight. Amidst market transformations influenced by factors like tariffs, inflation, and fluctuating demand in the global B2B sector, Pricefx's success paints a picture of a shifting landscape with promising opportunities.

data.title: Planview reports strong 2025 momentum with significant customer growth and AI innovation, setting the stage for 2026.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Planview revealed impressive strides during 2025, powered by a substantial increase in customers, advancements in AI technology, and widespread acknowledgment within the industry.

data.title: PROS and Lufthansa Group extend strategic partnership, emphasizing AI solutions. Renewal marks successful collaboration.
data.description: In Houston, PROS Holdings, Inc., a key player in AI-driven SaaS pricing and selling solutions, revealed that they have extended their strategic partnership with Lufthansa Group. This extended collaboration follows many successful years of working together and has proven to be highly beneficial for both parties. The renewed agreement highlights the dedication of both PROS Holdings, Inc. and Lufthansa Group to advancing commercial offer innovation. The partnership empowers Lufthansa Group to enhance offer quality, adapt to market changes, and continue to deliver value.

data.title: Andersen Consulting partners with Italian agency Internet & Idee for digital transformation services.
data.description: In San Francisco, Andersen Consulting has recently announced a partnership with Internet & Idee, a digital consulting agency based in Italy. The collaboration agreement is aimed at strengthening their respective digital services and capabilities. This partnership signifies a significant step for Andersen Consulting in expanding its reach globally and enhancing its offerings in the digital consulting sector.

data.title: Aeropay expands Chicago headquarters with 15,000 sq ft space on 39th floor of One East Wacker. #fintech
data.description: Chicago-based fintech company Aeropay has unveiled its newly expanded headquarters in the city, demonstrating its commitment to local growth. The new facility, located in One East Wacker, spans 15,000 square feet on the 39th-floor penthouse level. The construction project was undertaken in partnership with Centre Construction Group. This significant development signifies Aeropay's dedication to investing in its hometown market and sets the stage for further expansion.

data.title: LG CHI Color Master Factory wins 2025 AI Award in Beauty & Wellness, recognized for AI-driven innovation.
data.description: The LG CHI Color Master Factory in Houston has received the prestigious 2025 Artificial Intelligence Award (AiA) in the Beauty & Wellness category. The award was presented by M.M.M International®, a prominent entity in media, marketing, and event production in the Middle East. This recognition highlights the factory's commitment to AI-driven innovation in the beauty industry. Among stiff competition from global contenders, the LG CHI Color Master Factory emerged as a trailblazer in revolutionizing hair color with AI technology.

data.title: Mineros S.A. joins S&P/TSX Global Mining Index on January 14, 2026, after a December 2025 review. CEO sees it as key milestone.
data.description: MEDELLIN, Colombia--Mineros S.A. reveals it has been included in the S&P/TSX Global Mining Index, starting from January 14, 2026. The company's stock ticker symbols are TSX:MSA, OTCQX:MNSAF, and BVC:MINEROS. Following the quarterly review and rebalancing in December 2025, Mineros was added to the aforementioned index. Daniel Henao, President & CEO of Mineros, expressed that being part of the S&P/TSX Global Mining Index signifies a significant achievement for the company, marking a new phase in its corporate growth.

data.title: Artist Temi Coker introduces Nigerian-inspired home collection at Walmart in Dallas for limited time, integrating culture into modern homes, Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: A talented artist in Dallas has been crafting pieces designed to withstand the test of time, becoming cherished heirlooms passed down through generations. With a focus on merging culture and spirituality, these creations are not just stored away but meant to be integrated into daily life. The artist's work aims to preserve tradition and stories, with intricate patterns that carry special meanings. The pieces produced are intended to last for years to come, becoming a part of family legacies. The artist's dedication to blending culture and artistry ensures that each creation is imbued with a sense of reverence and history.

data.title: Building Performance Association approved for nationwide energy efficiency apprenticeships by US Department of Labor's Office of Apprenticeship.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 21, 2026, the Building Performance Association (BPA) shared that its National Guideline Standards for Registered Apprenticeship Programs have been officially approved by the U.S. Department of Labor's Office of Apprenticeship. This achievement allows BPA to solidify its position in the industry and signifies a significant step towards enhancing the quality and effectiveness of apprenticeship programs nationwide.
